title: HazardousMaterialDetailsResponse

signalWords.description: This array contains available hazardous materials signal words for the specified marketplace.

statements.description: This array contains available hazardous materials hazard statements for the specified marketplace.

pictograms.description: This array contains of available hazardous materials hazard pictograms for the specified marketplace.

description: A type that defines the response fields for the getHazardousMaterialsLabels method.
